experiment: Agent-Executing Sandbox Tier 1 (ADR-101/102) — does surface-driven evaluation make the behavioural manifold live?
method: Same evolve() run (5 generations, 4 children, seed 5, selection behavioral-diversity) under two sandbox modes. Niche entropy = Shannon entropy of behavioralNiche over the scored archive; distinctScores = unique finalScore values. Deterministic.
conclusion: Mock mode makes BOTH the behavioural manifold (entropy 0 -> 0.69) and the fitness signal (flat 0.985 -> spread 0.435-0.802) non-degenerate. The keystone (ADR-101) works: surface-dependent traces activate the whole selection stack. Reproducible (deterministic, no LLM/wall-clock).
